transcript.text: I shifted places.
So I'm in, I'm in Budapest for the next two weeks.
So I kind of escaped the heat wave, not because of the heat wave, but, you know, I don't have a heat wave where I'm at right now, thankfully.
So, yeah, that's, that has to be very refreshing.
felt bad every time you're like, yeah, it's like 35 degrees.
Let's just go somewhere else.
Yeah, I just got to, just got to pick up and move for a little bit.
Yeah, I actually came here to visit a friend and he's, he's adopted a new pup.
So it's been super, like, de-stressing just being around that pup.
So yeah, it's, yeah, it's probably been a great visit.
So yeah.
Yeah.
New, new pets are always, always fun.
And I don't know, is it like a puppy puppy?
Yeah, it's, it's a puppy.
I think he's like, he's just been weaned.
So he's like eight, nine weeks old.
So yeah.
Oh my God, that's the best.
Yeah, we, we.
We got a 10-week-old puppy, I want to say in October of last year, and it was, oh, so fun.
They're so silly at that age.
They're just barely existing as creatures.
Yeah, yeah, yeah.
It's been good.
I have come at a kind of interesting time because they're having their National Day celebrations or whatever.
So the place where I'm staying in, there's going to be fireworks right next door.
So, yeah, let's see how that goes.
But, yeah.
I mean, that has to be a cool experience, at least.
That'll be fun to watch.
It is.
It's nice.
The whole city is going to be lit up, and they're going to just, yeah, the usual fireworks off the bridges and everything.
So it's pretty sweet.
Nice.
Yeah, that'll be cool.
I feel like I've only ever, like, seen that in the context of American celebrations.
So I feel like it would just be cool to see that elsewhere.
Yeah.
Yeah.
July 4th is pretty sweet.
So I remember watching my first firework, so it was pretty cool.
Yeah, it's positive and negative.
It's a weird time.
Yeah, yeah.
Are we waiting on Connor?
Datable.
Let me see if he's double booked.
He's got a question mark for this one.
Doesn't look like he has anything else going on, so he may pop in, he may not, but we can likely just get started.
And go from there, and I can fill him in later if needed.
Yeah, sounds good.
So my screen setup has changed, by the way, so I absolutely cannot see you.
If there's any questions or whatever, you know, just feel free to interrupt me.
So yeah, just turning to the updates, we delivered seven articles last week, 26 in review.
think that's come down to like 23 or more or less.
So we got down to 18.
think Prateek went.
Catch-up mode today, so we should be in a good spot there.
Cool, good stuff.
So we're on track to deliver six new articles this week.
I think one of them was a refresh, so that's why it's six and not seven usually.
And then, yeah, just as an update, we, you know, as you know, we deployed that, the schema to hopefully solve the run Galileo text.
I still haven't seen any changes, but it usually takes like two to eight weeks.
So we're just going to have to wait over there.
And then the prompts for Scrunch, we still have to review those.
Mara is out of office this week, and I'm playing catch-up because we have a bunch of people on vacation.
So I'm going to get to that today or tomorrow, and then we'll revise those prompts and get them out to you.
And then regarding publishing, I think he responded to Kirk, and then he responded back with, I think he needed to set up a sync.
And then, yeah.
Yeah.
So that was the latest on that.
Sorry, was there?
I was going to I'm going to try to set that up for him after this call.
I was just about to take look at it just to confirm functionality and make sure there's no extra configuration needed.
Yep, cool.
So moving on to performance.
So this last week, we had a bit of a drop from the previous week's peak.
It's not a major drop or anything, but yeah, generally, we're putting this one down to seasonality because we haven't seen any major position losses in Google.
And generally, things still seem to be on track, so no major issues there.
Just an update on the GPT-5 blog that we released.
There was a weird issue.
It did not get indexed immediately, which is a bit odd.
So I manually sort of pushed that for indexing.
So I'll be keeping an
eye on that just to see if, like, are we having any budding indexing issues?
I don't think it is, but every now and then you get this issue.
So, yeah, so generally the Google referrals, Google traffic dropped slightly, but in terms of non-branded and branded impressions, we continue to do really well.
We're approaching new highs, so good news over there.

In terms of the content cluster performance, there was a slight drop-off given the overall drop-off in traffic, and as I mentioned, sorry, we're not seeing any drop-in positions, so, you know, we think it's a blip basically for a week.
There was a slight drop in LLM referrals to Galileo's website, but again, it's off an all-time high, so it's not a major drop.
The drop was mainly in Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude, and we're seeing more referrals from Copilot as well, so pretty interesting there.
In terms of the use cases, so just let me.
I opened the Looker.
So I added the overall search volumes for the keywords as well as the CPC, as we discussed last week.
And so, yeah, it's pretty much, you know, everything is in here.
Hopefully, you know, let us know if you need anything else.
Filtering just for the top 10.
So far, evaluations leads the way with about 142.
And then the rest are a bit way behind.
One of the reasons for this is just the way I think we are categorizing keywords.
Like a lot of our keywords are falling under evaluations.
But as observability and reliability, which I guess is kind of a subset of that, you know, it's we're obviously not categorizing as many keywords in there.
So just want to point that out because it's not due to a lack of content or anything like that.
That key number of keywords are low.
So generally, yeah, this report is there in Looker, you know, to let us know if you need anything.
over there.
And finally, an update regarding the comparison to Arise.
So we're up to 305 from 294 last week, and Arise is at 872.
So yeah, I mean, when we started tracking a couple, three weeks back, we were, I think, around 250 or something.
So we are catching up.
But yeah, there's still a way to go, and we're pretty certain we'll get there.
So yeah, that's pretty much it.
Any questions I can answer about any of this?
No, I feel like this is all, this all makes sense.
Thank you for adding the CPC and search volume.
That is super helpful.
I'm going to go through that a bit more today as I get back into Google Ads land.
It makes sense as far as the categorical breakdown by keyword.
I feel like, I'm guessing, yeah, it's not a lack of content.
That observability is definitely a subset of things.
I think think
If we want to lean harder into that style of content moving forward, I know internally there's a big push towards observability becoming the, like, core focus over evaluations.
I know we owe you guys the updated positioning.
Connor is just waiting on finalization from Vikram and Jason this week.
So that is, like, actually about to come through the pipeline finally after two months.
So hopefully once you guys get that, there will be a little bit more clarity as far as, like, future content.
And I tried to do, I tried to leverage what I know about our upcoming positioning for, like, the upcoming prompts for Scrunched and stuff just to future-proof it a little bit.
But I know observability is definitely a big one and a lot more stuff based on agents specifically.
know both of those are, like, kind of core focuses.
Should we, should I then wait till Connor sends over the repositioning deck to work on the scrunch prompts?
My gut instinct says yes, but I also, I just, I don't want to string you guys along much further because it's, I've heard it's coming.
I've heard that for a while now, but he says he's just waiting on Vikram and Jason's like final, final pass.
But I think my feedback was definitely like leveraging what I know of the new positioning.
And a lot of it was just notes on more stuff focused on agents specifically related to each pillar topic.
So like agent evaluation, agent observability, like.
Agent guard railing.
then just, I think, some other, hold on, let me go back to it really quick so I can remind myself.
Where is that?
Yeah, I looked at comments regarding the feedback, so I think you dropped it there.
Yep.
Yep.
Yeah, so all of those, like, those are going to be pretty critical for our new positioning, is, like, the content that I highlighted.

So I think you should be good to go, and anything else is, like, future-proofing almost a little too far because, obviously, the market's so nascent that, like, you know, some of these things are things that are somewhat net new even to us.
So I think it's probably a safe bet to get started now.
Okay, cool.
Yeah, I'll take a look at that.
I'll have it out to you by tomorrow or by early Friday.
That'd be great.
Yeah.
Okay.
Yeah, think the talking points, I think we're...
Pretty much through them.
So the prompt tracking list I just mentioned, and then I saw the link you sent from Jeffrey for the Figma board.
So I'll take a look at that as well.
And yeah, the next step there would be if everything's okay, we'll just drop up a content template, and then we can start producing these things.
So should be, should be good to go over there.
Yeah, that was, that was pretty much it.
Awesome.
If there's anything else.
Um, let me think.
Um, as far as the model pages, they, those are good to go.
Um, would you want me to pass that off to our web dev agency and get them mocking up in framers so you guys can build out the collections there?
Uh, think that would be a task for mid, early to mid next week.
Um, Um, um

Let me take a look at the designs, and then based on that, I'll create the template or send over an initial template, and then they can use that to create the backend in Framer, as it makes sense for them.
Cool.
That works for me.
So yeah, as soon as that's ready, then I can pass that off to them with the right specifications to make sure we don't make any rework later.
Yeah, yeah.
Sounds good.
Cool.
I think other than that, I know your guys' team is working on the audit of some older blogs for fixing some of the inline images and all that stuff.
Yeah, so we have somebody who's like hopping between Sanity and Framer and just like exposing stuff.
So yeah, yeah, I should have included that at the update, but basically he had some initial access issues to Sanity, which we sorted out.
So he's got started on that yesterday, and yeah, I think it's going
Take him at least a week, but I will keep you updated on progress over there.
Cool.

Yeah, and if we have to do more of like a, more of a tech debt, blog debt week and be lighter on article generation, that's fine since we have so many outstanding and we're waiting on new positioning.
So feel free to shift around priorities as needed.
Okay, sounds good.
Yeah, that would be, yeah, I will circle back by Friday just to see how long it's taking him.
And then if it's taking too long, maybe we can just, you know, get this done like next week or something.
So perfect.
Yeah, that works for me.
And I think that really about covers it.
I'll let you know if anything else comes up.
I think we should be in a good spot.
All right, cool.
Thanks, Jackson.
I will, yeah, I'll follow up on Slack.
Yeah, sounds good.
Thanks, Vivek.
Have a good rest of your day and have fun with the celebration tonight.
I will.
Thank you.
Thank you.
Bye.
Of course.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content production, performance metrics, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 7 articles delivered last week, 6 new articles (incl. 1 refresh) planned this week](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Performance metrics show slight dip (likely seasonal); overall trend remains positive with approaching new highs in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [New positioning deck from Galileo expected soon; will inform future content strategy (focus on observability, agents)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Ongoing projects: Scrunch prompts review, publishing setup, model pages development, blog image audit](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Update

  - [7 articles delivered last week](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [26 in review, reduced to \~18-23](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [6 new articles planned this week (incl. 1 refresh)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Schema deployed for "run Galileo text" issue; results expected in 2-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Scrunch prompts review pending; Vivek to complete by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Slight drop in overall traffic (attributed to seasonality)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [No major position losses in Google](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Non-branded and branded impressions approaching new highs](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Minor indexing issue with GPT-5 blog post (manually resolved)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Slight decrease in LLM referrals (mainly Perplexity, Gemini, Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Increase in referrals from Copilot](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)

### Content Cluster Performance

  - [Updated Looker report with search volumes and CPC for use cases](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Evaluations leads with 142 keywords; other categories lower due to categorization](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Galileo at 305 vs. Arise at 872 (up from \~250 three weeks ago)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)

### Positioning and Future Content Strategy

  - [New positioning deck expected soon from Connor (awaiting final approval)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Shift towards observability as core focus over evaluations](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Increased emphasis on agent-specific content (evaluation, observability, guard-railing)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### Ongoing Projects

  - [Model pages: Vivek to review designs and create template for web dev agency](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Blog image audit: Team member working on fixing inline images (estimated 1-week timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Potential "tech debt week" to focus on blog improvements if needed](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to review and revise Scrunch prompts by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Vivek to examine Figma board link from Jeffrey](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Create content template for new content type (after Figma review)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)
  - [Vivek to create initial template for model pages (early to mid-next week)](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Jackson to pass model page specifications to web dev agency after template is ready](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [Vivek to update on blog image audit progress by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Team to potentially shift priorities for a "tech debt week" if needed](https://fathom.video/share/QcwApe5wyji-7fNYZf7Xa-AwLrzvtxZm?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

action_items.description: Set up sync for Kirk re publishing functionality
Review & revise Scrunch prompts, send to Jackson by Fri AM
Review Figma board link from Jeffrey for model pages
Create initial content template for model pages (for next week)
Update Jackson on progress of fixing inline images in old blogs by Fri
